zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall於1250年出生在英國英格蘭。他於1267年與Lady Frances Mallory在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall于1250年出生在英国英格兰。他于1267年与Lady Frances Mallory在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Warhall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: unexplained. John Wathew, 1574 in   IGI   (Nantwich, Cheshire), suggests the possibility that it is an irregular variant of   Walthew  .

variants.name: Walthew
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Walthef, Waldef, Walthew, Wallef (Old English Wælþēof, an anglicized form of Old Scandinavian Valþiófr). The personal name is mostly recorded in N England and the N Midlands. For the name in Scotland, see Waldie . See also Wallett , Whattoff .

variants.name: IGI
meanings: 1 English: (i) perhaps a variant of Garth with loss of -r- before the final consonant. Compare Thomas Gath, 1600, John Garth, 1619 in IGI (Saint Keyne, Cornwall); Nicholas Gath, 1716, Thomas Garth, 1726 in IGI (Saint Breward, Cornwall). (ii) alternatively, a variant of Goth with unrounding of the vowel, if not vice versa.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall was born in 1250, in England, United Kingdom. He married Lady Frances Mallory in 1267, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall est né en 1250, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Lady Frances Mallory en 1267, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall wurde 1250 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1267 in England, United Kingdom Lady Frances Mallory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall è nato il nel 1250 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Lady Frances Mallory nel 1267, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhallは1250年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。1267年にイギリスイギリスでLady Frances Malloryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall(은)는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 1267년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Frances Mallory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall nasceu em 1250, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Lady Frances Mallory em 1267, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall родился в 1250 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Frances Mallory в 1267 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Warhall nació en 1250, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Lady Frances Mallory en 1267, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en su pueblo.
